name: metabase
description: Connect Codex to Metabase analytics through native MCP or a read-only legacy API bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze Metabase metrics, models, dashboards, and tables.
interface.longDescription: Use a single canonical Metabase MCP server name that points to native Metabase MCP when available, or a read-only local API bridge for older Metabase instances. Native mode uses Metabase OAuth. Legacy mode reads credentials from environment variables or macOS Keychain and exposes conservative read tools.
defaultPrompt: Find the metric behind this KPI and explain its trend.
Summarize this dashboard with source object IDs.
Compare this month's performance to last month.
Run the Metabase plugin smoke test.
